boundaryStatement: Confidence is not approval. Preliminary decision-support only. Final feasibility depends on base material, geometry, service conditions, inspection requirements, and expert review.
noBackendNote: No backend. No data sent by this site.
noAutomaticSendingNote: No automatic sending. Nothing is sent unless you send it from your own email client.

brief.situation: Public-safe dummy example: melt-pool or camera anomaly needs interpretation.
brief.component: LMD job with process signal anomaly
brief.goal: Separate process awareness from quality evidence.
brief.geometryOrSize: Track/layer context not yet linked to full part geometry.
brief.damageOrBuildArea: Process signal anomaly; physical defect not confirmed.
riskFlags: A process signal does not prove final part quality.
Unlinked signal data can create false confidence.
No inspection result has been connected to the signal.
evidenceNeeded: Dimensional or NDT evidence where risk requires it
brief.preliminaryRoute: Use the Quality Evidence Ladder before treating the signal as proof.
brief.completenessNote: Completeness describes whether the brief can support a useful conversation. It is not feasibility, approval, or release evidence.
brief.evidenceBurdenNote: Evidence burden is a planning label, not release approval.
brief.nextAction: Connect the signal to inspection evidence before making a quality claim.
brief.exafuseReviewRoute: Use Exafuse for commercial and technical review when the monitoring question affects a real job or acceptance route.
brief.boundaryStatement: Confidence is not approval. Preliminary decision-support only. Final feasibility depends on base material, geometry, service conditions, inspection requirements, and expert review.
